title: Build agentic full-stack apps with Genkit
summary: Build agentic full-stack apps with Genkit
whyItMatters: The open-source Genkit framework has introduced the Agents API, a full-stack tool designed to simplify the complex plumbing of conversational AI by packaging message history, tool loops, and streaming into a single interface. The API supports flexible, server- or client-managed state persistence—allowing for advanced workflows like history branching, long-r…
